Information about Analyze Assist, and instructions for downloading, installing, and running Analyze Assist.{% endblock %} {% block keywords %}introduction, analysis, TM, translation, memory, Felix, TMX, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, HTML, XML, free, manual, help, documentation{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Utilities

A number of command-line utilities are included so that you can use AnalyzeAssist more flexibly within your own workflow.

The included command-line utilities are as follows.

  • Dump Text
    A GUI program to extract the segments from a list of documents and writes them to text files
  • extract_segments
    A command-line program to extract segments from a list of documents and writes them to text files
  • analyze_files
    A command-line program to analyze the specified documents against the specified memories
  • Contents
    • {% for item in index %}
  • {{item.title}}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
